import React, { useState } from 'react'; import './Contact.css'; export default function Contact({ navigate }) { const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', phone: '', subject: '', msg: '' }); const [sent, setSent] = useState(false); const handleSubmit = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setSent(true); }; return (
